About_&_Key_Points:
About
Bharat Petroleum Corporation is a public sector company which is engaged in the business of refining of crude oil and marketing of petroleum products.
[1]
Key Points
Refining and Marketing Scale:
[1]
BPCL operates the Mumbai, Kochi and Bina refineries with combined capacity of
35.3 MMTPA
, around
14% of India's refining capacity
. FY26 refinery throughput reached
41.15 MMT
, implying sustained operation above nameplate capacity, while distillate yield improved to
84.54%
.
[1]
[2]
Domestic petroleum-product sales rose to
54.18 MMT
in FY26, giving BPCL a
27.27% market share
; the network expanded to
25,323 retail outlets
.
[1]
In LPG, BPCL had a
27.53% market share
, 57 bottling plants, over 6,278 distributors
and approximately 8.6 crore customer connections in FY26.
[1]
The wider network also includes industrial customers, aviation stations, lubricant-blending plants and city-gas geographical areas, keeping BPCL present across refining, logistics and multiple fuel-distribution channels.
[3]
